title: jatropha pilosa
intro: Jatropha pilosa, also known as the hairy jatropha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The roots of Jatropha pilosa have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Jatropha pilosa, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
